since_last: 38% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +2.72%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC -0.27% · Gold +0.14% · Nasdaq100 -0.28%. 38% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +2.72%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +2.72%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.24%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: DELL is the standout at -10.57%
cards.body: Leaders: POWL +6.72%, BABA +5.56%, PINS +4.38%, AAPL +3.99%, ORCL +3.53%. Laggards: DELL -10.57%, SKHY -10.56%, MU -8.28%, MRVL -7.39%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.21% at $135.8
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.21% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
